programmes.show_description: 1/2. The epic story of Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar resisting Italian occupation in the 1930s. Can guerrillas beat Italian military might? Anthony Quinn and Ollie Reed star.
1/10. Marcus Wareing adopts a slower-paced life at his Sussex smallholding. He brings in new pigs, shares his bounty with the locals and cooks up a feast
Two archaeologists and a historian try Edwardian life for a year. They prepare for the arrival of their first livestock, and historian Ruth Goodman cooks a sheep's head stew.
8/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Charles Hanson, Linda Lambert and Zoe Pocock head to Cambridge.

24/35. Charlie and Lee are in Newport to design a garden for Angie and her treasured dog Stan that will transform her neglected space into a haven to remember lost loved ones.
1/10. Marcus Wareing adopts a slower-paced life at his Sussex smallholding. He brings in new pigs, shares his bounty with the locals and cooks up a feast
Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team branch out into market gardening, all-year-round egg production and beef cattle.
7/8. A guitar amp used by Jimi Hendrix, a bizarre collection of celebrity hair, a stunning vintage travel trunk, and a chair with ornate pagan carvings all go under the hammer.
Tonia Buxton visits the island of Crete where she creates Cretan pork, cooked with aubergines, bay leaves and cumin seeds. After that, halvas is the pudding of the day with its semolina-base.(S1/E3)
Rhodes is one of the twelve Dodecanese islands; popular among island-hoppers as they're so close together. Tonia Buxton cooks up a delicious feast of afelia braised pork with coriander seeds.(S1/E4)
7/8. Stefan reports on the safety of American chlorinated chicken. Sian learns about the side effects of detox teas. Food made from insects too.
Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team branch out into market gardening, all-year-round egg production and beef cattle.
2/10. Marcus returns to an old stomping ground in search of veg-growing tips and helps a local farmer with hay bailing.

1/3. Alan Titchmarsh and the team help a 15-year-old boy confined to his wheelchair who has become increasingly confined to his house and cannot access the garden.

programmes.show_name: Mary Millington: Come Play With Me
programmes.show_description: Two hapless forgers hide out in a Scottish manor house. When a troupe of dancing girls join them musical numbers, comedy and sauce ensues. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
2/2. The epic tale of Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar concludes with relentless resistance to Italian conquest - through sacrifice and bloodshed. Anthony Quinn and Ollie Reed star.
Kevin McNally stars as Porthos, one of the Three Musketeers, in this award-winning short drama.

Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team get to grips with the revolutionary technologies of the age.
8/8. A piece of Ayrton Senna's race car and a poster from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened are some of the rarities up for grabs this time. Last in series.
Tonia Buxton is on the island of Naxos, famous for its beaches and local cuisine. She sets out to pick vine leaves as the basis for the famous Greek dish, dolmades.(S1/E5)
Tonia Buxton heads for Santorini with its spectacular volcanic scenery and lively nightlife. She visits a tomato farm where she gathers her ingredients to make delicious tomato fritters.(S1/E6)
8/8. Is British grass-fed beef the best regarding food miles? Is bottled water is worth the price. Plus, the healthiness of lunchtime meals.

3/10. Marcus is on the hunt for the perfect chicken and gets a lesson in developing his own mushroom patch.

2/3. Alan meets Anne and Mike who has dementia. The layout of the house and garden means Mike is finding it difficult to cope and risks never leaving his home.
Bad girls don't come to London, they're made in London. Suzy, a young country girl, is led astray by the wild members of a rock group. Contains nudity and 70s social attitudes.
